name: ArchitecturallyUndefined
comment: ARMv4 reserves the bits 27:25 = 011 + bit 4 = 1 encoding space as 'always undefined' — guaranteed never to be assigned a meaning. Trap to UndefinedInstruction.

formats.name: Undefined_Reserved_011_x4_1
formats.comment: cccc 011 xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx 1 xxxx  (20 don't-care bits + bit 4 = 1 + 4 don't-care bits)
